## Feature Request

### Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

### Rationale

Explain why this feature matters and how it benefits this repository.

### Proposed Shape

Describe the expected API, command, workflow, documentation, or user-facing behavior if you have a preference.

### Additional Context

Add any other context or information about the feature request here.
